title: Word Formation: Wonders of the World

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: The ancient wonders of the world stand as testament to the ingenuity of early 1.1. _________ (1.1). The 1.2. _________ (1.2) of archaeological sites has revealed fascinating details about how these monumental structures were built. Many landmarks have suffered significant 1.3. _________ (1.3) over the centuries due to natural erosion and conflict. The 1.4. _________ (1.4) of damaged monuments demands that craftspeople work 1.5. _________ (1.5) to preserve historical accuracy. Some ancient rulers who commissioned these structures were later 1.6. _________ (1.6) by political rivals, yet their architectural legacy endured. UNESCO awards its 1.7. _________ (1.7) World Heritage status through an official 1.8. _________ (1.8) process, ensuring that selected sites receive international protection and funding for preservation.
